name: OpenAI o1-pro
archDisplay: Dense transformer reasoning model, extended test-time compute (exact size undisclosed); ChatGPT Pro-exclusive configuration of o1, not a separate architecture
note: Higher-compute configuration of o1, launched alongside the full o1 model and the $200/mo ChatGPT Pro tier on Dec 5, 2024; added to the API on March 25, 2025 at $150/$600 per M tokens (10x o1's output price). Later superseded by o3-pro (already in corpus).
